---
title: "Paper → Code"
subtitle: "The paper said it works. Let me show you how."
page-layout: full
toc: false
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date asc"
  type: default
  categories: false
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  include:
    categories: "{paper-to-code}"
  fields: [date, title, description, reading-time]
---

```{=html}
<div class="pp-series-hero">
  <span class="pp-series-badge badge-d">Series D</span>
  <p class="pp-series-intro">
    Research papers with no public code, unclear implementations, or MATLAB-only repositories — implemented cleanly in Python for graduate students. Every post walks through the paper's key idea, the maths behind it, and a working implementation you can actually run.
  </p>
  <div class="pp-series-nav">
    <a href="index.html">← All Series</a>
  </div>
</div>
```
